## 🧭 Issue Type
Select the type of issue you are raising (check all that apply):
- [ ] Bug Report (something is broken or behaving incorrectly)
- [ ] Feature Request (suggesting a new feature or enhancement)
- [ ] Documentation (issues or suggestions regarding README or contributing guides)
- [ ] Performance Issue (app lagging, coordinate updates delayed, battery drainage)
- [ ] General Inquiry / Question

---

## 📝 Issue Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of the issue or feature request.

---

## 🐛 Section A: Bug Reports (If applicable)

### 🚶 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

### 📊 Environment details
- **Device**: [e.g., iPhone 15 Pro, MacBook Air]
- **OS / Version**: [e.g., iOS 17.5, macOS Sonoma]
- **Browser / Version**: [e.g., Safari Mobile, Chrome]
- **Connection**: [e.g., Wi-Fi, 5G, Offline]

### 💻 Logs & Diagnostics
```text
[Paste browser console errors or backend server logs here]
```

---

## ✨ Section B: Feature Requests & Enhancements (If applicable)

### 💡 The Solution
*Describe the feature you'd like and how it improves the spontaneous discovery of nearby users or neighbors.*

### ⚙️ Proposed Implementation
*Outline the technical details if you have an implementation plan (frontend component shifts, websocket events, Redis schemas, etc.).*

---

## 📸 Visuals (if applicable)
Attach screenshots or screen recordings to help illustrate the issue or feature design.
